name: consulting agencies processing 5–15 new hires/month tool
description: For consulting agencies processing 5–15 new hires/month, paperwork delays cause onboarding bottlenecks. We automate onboarding instead of manual onboarding processes using email and paper forms.
problem_solved: Delays in onboarding new hires due to manual paperwork processes.
